review_text: For an app "designed to be deleted," I don't seem to have a whole lot of reasons to do so besides the fact that it doesn't work. A year in of using it, I've gotten 1 single match with someone who didn't even converse with me. Tried using Hinge+, and somehow got 0 matches total. I've used Hinge Platinum a long time ago, but paying $50 a month is steep. This app is either free, and it sometimes works, or it's not free at all.

The app is quite easy to operate, user friendly and well articulated in many terms. However, you need to work on the way you bring the same options again and again and again which goes on for lifetime even after one rejects.Agreed that one might choose whom they've rejected in one go. Although! not ten times in repetitive mode, there is when it feels like " I should put off this app" other than that good to go.

Neutral experience overall. Issues with the app include high prices, standouts are *abysmally* bad, and there's oddly no way to filter by sexuality (or orientation). I'd like to see other demisexuals, you know? It also feels like most people don't take this seriously: lazy profiles, blank likes (even though it prompts a mesaage), and people tend to struggle with engaging in basic conversation for some reason. Idk, maybe it's the area, the people here, or maybe apps just aren't for me?

While I appreciate Hinge seemingly being more reputable than other apps, what I find frustrating is how these questions sometimes don't encourage more detailed answers. Often one or two word responses. It's almost as bad as Tinder with it's countless empty profiles. Please find a way to encourage more information. Not asking for a life story, but a little more detail. Also, you charge far too much for your premium services. Far too much.. Praying on people who just want to find someone!

First time user of any dating app and I met someone. I've only had the app about a week or so. It's easy to use, fun and addictive so be careful I guess. I like that I can chat easily with people and don't have to go to another app to talk. The notifications work great, I like that people can leave a note before they choose to match with someone and I love that we can unmatch someone so the conversations disappear and I don't have to see them in my messages anymore.

There’s so many dating apps on the market nowadays and I probably tried most of the big ones at some point or another. Some stand out, some disappoint and I think the majority settles somewhere in the middle. I’d say hinge stands out. Less fake profiles because of their verification and maybe it’s due to their marketing but it has attractive women that have a good mindset and want to engage. I also like the design

Shower of idiots running this app, just delete your account without reason and no warning at the drop of a hat just as I was going to meet someone and it was my only method of communication with them so they've cost me a potential future partner. Don't join and also full of bots both running the app and a lot on as members! I would've gave 0 stars to be honest if this had let me!
They're using user data for AI training /machine learning.

GO TO BUMBLE... Bumble is way better in matchs. Was banned for unknown reasons from hinge after being a purchaser of there service for 5 years. Support won't tell me why nor will they respond to any emails... I would avoid this app at all costs. they don't care about there customers

5 profiles shown, then no more shown in a city of half a million. Can't even use my like quota. Filters wide open, out to 160km. Some "standout" profiles are obviously fake (reported). It's good most profiles are genuine and the reporting works but that's a looooow bar, and 99% are tourists but I'm looking for long term. No way to filter tourists out, to look for people who live in my country like other apps. Conclusion: The app is a ghost town, probably because it costs 3x more than it should.
It's definitely designed to be deleted because you won't meet anyone 😂.

you must spend money in order to get messages from your matches. I've had the app for 4-5 months and had many matches and I never got a reply from my matches after sending them the first message after matching. no way there's that many that dont even say hi. I do not recommend this app. I rather contribute if it works and it has not proved that it does. 👎
seems to good to be true, it is. was on a few days, just looking but not willing to drop £30 a week to send likes, and apparently, that's a violation of the terms and conditions and was banned!

Woke up this morning to an email saying I've been banned for violating ToS, but all my pics are fine and I've never said anything out of line. They didn't actually tell me why. I put in an appeal, but after researching, it apparently is rarely successful to be unbanned. Such a shame considering I thought this was one of the better dating apps. EDIT: Appeal denied. Wow, just wow. A ton of bot accounts, but you ban a legit person. Especially when you own Tinder with basically ALL bot accounts.

They've changed the default sort for likes and thus made hinge X completely worthless to purchase. they are falsely advertising the subscription knowing that those priority likes are not prioritized by them.

They banned my account for no reason, when I asked them what specific TOS I was "violating" they just gave the same copy and paste reply that was in the original banned notification. Good app, run by AI slop practices.

I never said a rude thing to anyone. But because I want to join the Asatru Folk Assembly, a moderator deleted my account. I never said a rude thing to anyone, mods discriminated against my religious beliefs.
Banned for no reason and right after paying for subscription. UPDATE: I was unbanned and then banned for no reason again. There's no safety or logic behind their bans.

TOTAL FRAUD COMPANY BEWARE! Fraud app. Verification kept failing without any reason, support ignored my refund and cancellation request, and after finally verifying, my account was banned within 30 minutes without explanation. I barely used the app. No proper support or refund process. Extremely unprofessional and misleading. Avoid this app.
just focus on you and touch grass, trust me lmao. don't play these games. don't pay these people.

Not the best, I've had hinge for a few months now and idk if its just me, but I hardly get any traffic on my account. I could not use the app for a while and come back to not a single match or like. I bought a premium package to boost my profile and that didnt even do anything. Also when I have my preference set to everyone I get nothing but men profiles, even when set to only female, im still getting male accounts. not worth downloading honestly.
ban without reason.

My account got blocked for no reason. No inappropriate pictures. Haven't even messaged anyone. I submitted a dispute and immediately got denied with mo explanation. Spent 50$ for a month subscription and got blocked for no reason. Ridiculous app. Dont waste your money.
so turns out EVERYONE in my area is a supermodel that travels all over the world. neat

Zero stars. So I was contacted by a sex worker on Hinge (i.e. a prostitute) and when I let this woman know in no uncertain terms I was not interested, she reported my profile to Hinge and I was banned without explanation. It's a terrible thing when a company takes your money and treats a customer so shoddily and you have no recourse. Just terrible! Also, I was never permitted to speak with an actual human being regarding my situation (despite many repeated efforts) and the ban is permanent.
Worst dating app of them all
Avoid this app waste of time and hinge is a poorly built app.

Now the app wont let you delete photos. Just reinstalled after over a year after removing the app only to find that Hinge has been using my old profile dispite me not being active. I wonder how many of the profiles on here are old and no longer used.
You will receive likes for 24 hours and then absolutely nothing as a way of getting you to pay.
it's the worst. I was getting so many matches but as soon as I bought hinge x, they shadow banned me..

BS app, the issue is in their basics, I was verified, had been using for reasonably long time, never had any issues with the app as such, helped them to remove scammers' account and one fine day found out these idiots banned my own account for no obvious reason, they don't even warn you before doing anything like that. Just found out that these arses own almost all the leading dating apps on the platform; white collar extortionists they are. Shame on you.
banned my account for no reason. it must be a false report. I literally am a very polite person. please help?
does anyone use this because no messages seem to go through...

Heh -- *terrible* (unintuitive) UI decisions: * despite off-the-charts intuitiveness and more than a decade of UI 'muscle-memory' within this app community, no swipe functionality of any kind? 😳🤯 * no effective age filter-got inundated with 'matches' half my age or younger despite setting age filter * app auto-skipping candidate matches because the phone went to sleep or I switched apps is pretty *dumb*... Would've been MORE user-friendly if you'd just flipped me the bird at the outset!

So many bots and people that just ghost you immediately. You can swipe on like 2 people if you're not paying their overpriced subscription. Actual garbage app, I somehow never get matches. No changes since last review

Racist and divisive algorithm. I date men of all races but cause I clicked a few from one race (amongst others) this is all I am shown now and the only likes I get, meaning my profiles only being shown to men of that race. Never experienced this on any other dating site. Not good. Don't know how they can think this is OK in 2026. People date outside of their own race, get over it. Why use race as a factor of matches instead of anything else? Really not a deciding factor to some of us.
"Designed to be deleted"- yeah because it's a big old cash grab and is so shite

As a gay man, I've used this app for a few years and the experience isn't the worst available but it's also not great. It seems like users in your type range are often only in standouts and don't come across the regular feed. I used a discount to try HingeX and it's the exact same experience but with the ability to send unlimited likes. I've had more success and luck on other apps for free. save your money and don't buy their pro tiers. not worth it.
I think without Paying the algorithm does not work well. I have been on Hinge since past 1 year and never got liked by anyone. how's that possible. I feel it is a scam
this app is definitely designed to be deleted

The app was working fine until one day (probably due to revenge reporting) they removed my account with no explanation whatsoever. The appeal option through the app is also a joke, some bot decides the fate of real human beings. Lost my contacts, my chats and not a thing one can do about it. Avoid like the plague.
This app is the worst, I was banned for no reason and they didn't explain why. This is after I had bought 3 months.

PLEASE READ. I was on Hinge and met a few really good women. My account was blocked for what Hinge called a community violation. My account was on pause. There was no violation. HINGE TOOK MY FACIAL RECOGNITION TO VERIFY ME, NOW ITS NOT ENOUGH. HINGE is a free site. HINGE wants copies of my up to date Identification to unblock my account *****WARNING***** This is called extortion. What HINGE IS DOING IS ILLEGAL. BE VERY CAREFUL. DO NOT GIVE YOUR IDENTIFICATION TO ANYONE.

No likes or matches. I wrote a similar post about Bumble. That is to say this app doesn't work. Try out OKCupid, Hily, or Tinder. At least there you'll get likes and matches. I have a clean profile that's verified. Even had my friends look over my profile. Yet I've only gotten 1 like. When I first made the account. Since then, nothing. Months in, not 1 like or match from anyone. I can't even get the support to help. I tried.

trash!!! literally did their face verification and allowed my face to be scanned and my account got banned. I only had the account for 10 to 15 mintues I did not post anything disrespectful, no nudity, no political related topics. I got banned and I reached out to their support and was told they can decide to ban you if they want even if you didn't post nudity or make rude comments.

update: pathetic I had given it a 3 star over 2 years ago. Doing that time I had my profile deleted by the people who run it. And this last time, without any explanation, it has been removed. They keep saying they're going to send a yes or no if they're going to reinstate it. Haven't heard from them. Actually, I've spoken with a few users and they told me the same thing. Are they trying to keep the ratio men to women low ? But, they're head hunchos are freaking scared to send me an email.
I downloaded the app and used it for a few hours. I liked a few people I didn't message anyone or violate any of the guidelines and all of a sudden I got banned for absolutely nothing.
Most of the people on this app are fake, some just start chating a bit at the begining and this does not last long, I believe this app to be just a perfect waste of One's time!....
THREE likes before being paywalled. Ludicrous.

I'm sorry I didn't think to read the reviews before I wasted my coins. I am disappointed that I had to pay and still had to purchase roses. Welllll, then there aren't' any referrals to send roses to. What a waste of my time and my money! Honestly, I clicked on only two guys after being on Hinge for 60 days! and all I got was CRICKETS! :-(
fake and fraud
extremely poor, these guys banned me and refused to give any reason on why. years later the account is still banned with zero possibility of appealing.

DO NOT send them your real ID they're trying to force new users to use their 3rd party app to steal your identity by claiming they're just trying to verify "your age" and that "you are who you say you are". This app is a scam do not, absolutely do not send them your ID or pay for anything!. BE WARNED!.

Horrible app that makes little sense. I am 48 and it gives me "perfect match" with ladies on their 58+. I guess in Finland that's considered feminist and normal, but it aint. Hundreds of smiles, "Hi" or basic like with no response are making me pretty confident to believe, that the profiles are either fake or AI generated.
I got banned almost immediately due to a false report and my appeal was never even looked at. literally no point in having an appeal process if your just going to ignore it.

Control over your profile, location, etc, is non-existent. Filled with bots. The worst app I've ever seen. Don't bother. Facebook Dating is 1000 times more likely to find a match than this piece of garbage.
scam scam scam I just opened the account, paid for subscription, less than 5 minutes they removed my account with no reason. I did not even start chatting with anyone. it's totally a fraud company
this app makes you pay for seeing likes and never matches you with people you could really connect with.
they banned me for no reason because I changed cell phones. and there was zero human review
owful
Appreciate the space. No return on investment in current times. Moving on but thanks!

Not great, but guess it's a problem with society rather than the app itself. However, matching system is not great, no way to make sure you match on values or personality or anything like that. So it's basically same as Tinder and everything else, just less busy.

"the dating app designed to get deleted" more like designed to get banned, absolute joke, you dont do anything wrong come back on after a week and all of a sudden you are banned 🙄 they dont even have to guts to tell you what they have banned you for, so you cant appeal anything, its a kangaroo court !

It's not free to message. I was sent a like. Member was not verified. Two people in photo, so you don't know who's writing you and had NO profile. The next like is blurred out and you're unable to message, see profile without paying.
paywalls and if yeah you pay is the same. this site sucks just like the rest of these apps. don't waste your time.

with past experiences, im beyond gun shy on paying for anything. I spent last year stopping a few dozen dating subscriptions cause of a single issue. People want to talk, meet up, but you just need to pay membership. once paid, everyone stops talking to you and most to all go offline. it stays like this until subscriptions stop, then you get floods of where did you go. I have gotten this hundreds of times since 2006. Kindly explain how you won't the trend of Match, Harmony, Tinder,ect.

Is this still broken ? Yup *2026 feb* they are still scamming. after wasting my life filling our their redundant ahh questions, only for my account to be banned within a few hours with no explanation. THEY ARE STEALING PEOPLES DATA & PICTURES.. not a trustworthy company plus the app is always broken & not working..

getting to be a worse and worse app experience. tons of couples with individual profiles looking for a third. new strange requirement to add a photo if you delete one (so if you have six you must keep six). meh. over it. unfortunately, filled with weird alpha bro trash.
My account was removed without warning or explanation. Appeal process was equally as worthless as they don't even talk to you.

I got banned for no reason (due to data protection they couldn't say why) and they kept my money for a subscription I paid for. Then they wanted to see my government ID. Where is the data protection there? So you can have my data while not giving me any information about what's going on while keeping my money? This is a scam! please be careful with this one

Hinge is basically a scam. I have tried HingeX and it provides no real benefit over the free version besides giving you unlimited likes and access to some basic filters. It definitely does not let you "skip the line". Hinge, like all other modern dating apps, is a garbage app that relies on fomo to suck people in and keep them there by showing them mostly people they would have no interest in, and every now and then showing a profile of a hot person who probably hasn't used the app in years.
amazing love meeting people who waste my timr

my account is banned for no reasons I didn't break any rules of the app, and even I tried many times to recover my account but I was unable to do so. but instead I use to get the emails from the team stating I have broken some rules, but it's not my fault if someone doesn't like the way I'm that's there mistake why they report to others account? this need to think by the app makers.
No real appeal process for being shadow banned
Clearly I'm not part of the 2% of guys getting matches. Last app I tried, guess I'll just go read a book or something

REFUSED REFUND WITHING 48 HOUR REQUEST!!! Subscribed, paid for 6 months, they ran out of matches for me in one day, I requested a refund WITHING 48 hours after subscribing, they DENIED and REFUSED to refund me money. STAY AWAY!!! BAD BUSINESS!!! UNETHICAL. I DO NOT recommend.
talked for 2 weeks to a woman on this app, made plans, and ghosted again, it's full of nothing but AI slop and scammers, never again!
ive never had an account with them and they banned me after only having matched one person. not sure what thats about. 0 stars from me. legit had the app for 1 hour lol.
$58 for unlimited likes for *one* month? Seriously?
Matchgroup PaytoWin model... not great for helping people actually find somebody they like. 🤷

if I could give negative stars I would. my account got flagged for literally no reason and I've been trying to verify my information for almost a week, their verification app is busted and their "support" team just keeps sending the same link over and over even though I've mentioned there's a clear problem with their app. Deleting, uninstalling and will badmouth this garbage app forever. Do yourself a favour and use any other app, cause if you EVER have a problem, you're on your own.
hides your account until you pay for premium. pushes your account after a few weeks of inactivity to get you back on the app. still a ton of Instagram/Snapchat bots
if you are a straight white man you cannot show visibility that you are interested in women? what's going on here? I NEED PLAIN ENGLISH RESPONSE OR LITIGATION WILL HAPPEN.

you get banned at the drop of a hat for no reason. reason wasn't even stated in the "account removed" page. this company is a joke and will remove your paid account and all of your matches that you had an established rapport with are gone instantly with no way to contact them again. all these dating apps are run by degenerate vampires so im not surprised 🤡🧃

admin team running this app are obviously trigger happy morons. Basically like walking on ice when using this App and say one wrong thing you'll get nailed to the wall and banned. A warning system would be nice or even temporary bans. Be very careful with what you say and even more careful giving them any of your money.

not a great app, saw a bunch of woman in my area that I liked but ran out of likes. Brought 1 week, and its been a week and I didn't see them at all, they just vanished. What a joke, they will probably come back when my subscription ends. also update, when I have likes there is no one to maych with, once I run out they just magically appear
Be careful a lot of strange people on this app

THIS IS APP IS A SCAM. here is how this app works: they have a zillion old inactive accounts to keep people thinking they have abundance of users. they will ban your account for no reason claim that you violated a policy without any explanation. Even if you try the face verification tool, it's very glitchy and does not work, so I am not sure if that's why they ban people. They do not make it required but they will ban you suddenly. This is such a poor app design. DO NOT PAY MONEY FOR THIS APP.
horrible experience all they care about is money not people's safety
Most features are behind a paywall so you cant really use it fully unless you pay
so much paywall
nms I literally thought i purchased something for 2 dollar for roses but finding out that actually purchased 100 dollar for roses then finding out i cant get my refund lame 💀💀💀.
can give a positive swipe to like five people before it ask for payment to do more
do not use. terrible app

I have to say, Hinge really keeps its word! 💖 It is truly designed to be deleted out of never ending options of exhaustion. ​It is a curated gallery for a very specific type of talent. People here have so much substance and deep thoughts on their profile, but they save their hollow FWB intentions just for us. 🥰 If you want an app that helps you uninstall hope and this is the one! 5 stars for making the 'Delete Account' button the most rewarding part of my day!
they banned me without any reason and didn't even listened to my appeal.
I started a new account, it sent me a verification code and immediately tells me its expired. Bye.
Got falsely banned and instantly denied for the appeal.
doesn't even recognise my number. 1 star.

It's okay, very underwhelming. I did get a lot of advertisement for another dating app, so switching to that one.
this app makes no sense. No one texts no one reached out.
I like the format, but there is no one on it. Not enough interested people here. 7 total people.
terrible

Terrible application with an algorithm that apparently doesn't even work properly. I am a gay man looking for men only as it is selected in my preferences. Despite that, I keep having women showing up and some being my "best match" or "my type" as per Hinge. Customer service is useless as they don't even understand their own product and how it works.
Apps like this should be illegal.
DO NOT SUGGEST ME TO SEND A ROSE to a person i dont want to. I know my rose is there i am not blind. it's not as if you will give me a spare one if I accidentally send it someone i didnt wanna.

It's cheaper to go to the strip club and is set up to only milk you of money like a strip club. **Edit after more use. 0 dates/10 rubbish connections compared to 50 connections and many dates using Bumble. update. 0 connections and again, Bumble keeps killing you. paid firewall

not great
worst experience without reason my account remove kar diya bakwas app hai
didn't get a single match in months 😭
nobody ever responds

Ya'll done did it again. Matched with 2 people, one was deleted and the other messaged back but I'm not able to see the message, it was deleted too... Sad. Guess we'll keep trying till 1 star and delete, move on to the next app.

the app is great but the thing is that if you want to view the People's profile and you want to see their pictures you can't unless you do the update and pay for the month for me I don't like it it's just it's not free and it's just wasted your time you want to look for the guy that you want but you can't see the pictures what's the point
i got band for no reason

Over 1 year, and have gotten only 1 like, no conversation. Yet on Tinder I got over 300 likes in 1 year. Not sure if my profile is even being shown. Wish it had analytical data to she how many times your profile has been viewed. The app so far is utter trash. My other complaint is that nearly every woman on it has Yes for Marijuana use. So literally nearly every female using this app is a drug addict, unreal. ZERO recommendations on this app.
horrible.
no customer support what so ever

I promise you- if you are an average or below average looking guy, you will get ZERO likes on Hinge. I don't know when things changed. Back in the day you could make an account and get a couple likes a week, but those days are long gone! Nothing good to be had from this app, don't waste your time!
I was either the ugliest guy there, or it never worked...
since they started using ai to check the complaint reports this app sucks. even my appeal was denied within a minute. swear to god this is a very bad experience for a person who is a premium member

I use the app for a couple days and you can only match with like three people a day it is so stupid I didn't even match with anyone and I'm not going to spend that much money on this I would not recommend using this app
fake accounts everywhere. buyer beware!
Shallow, superficial and pointless.

shamelessly wastes people's time by showing them the same profiles OVER AND OVER even after they had been already decided for left or right. additionally doesn't even have a dark mode and doesn't let you stop the autoplaying of videos. waste my time? u get a 1*. fair?
its just a dime a dozen dating app that charges people ridiculous prices to use it.
banned for no reason and jo ability to appeal
to many fake accounts only gotten 1 date of 2 years of being on here

Garbage app. I guarantee you'll never get any match because no one is even going to view your profile. Using it for four months, zero likes and matches even with Hinge X and even after using two boosts. While on other dating apps I got at least 20+ matches. Root cause: The app doesn't allow women to view likes until they take costly subscriptions and women have other free options so they don't take subscriptions and don't even see if you have liked them or not. Absolute garbage and useless.
the CEO of match group which owns hinge also is a board member of palantir. also it sucked anyways.

Bans profiles with vague reasoning. The team doesn't help to get your account back or care to understand that they might be wrong. I wouldn't use this service. Their slogan "designed to be deleted" is very accurate because they remove you from it and leave you no option but to uninstall the app!
Got permanently banned, got no refund, no customer service help for an appeal or an explanation. Awful app
not sure if they are bots or not but not easy to find people to talk to :/ or maybe I suck at this

do not use this app. it will randomly delete your account and lose all your matches, like it did to me. im paying for this service too

you know if you lowered the price more people would pay. you would still make same amount while being more useful and have more people on the app. i cant even remove my photos that i dont want stupid app
got permanently banned for a silly joke without a warning or anything and they didn't even refund the money
block my page without really terms
I was literally liking this app, when,suddenly without any explanation I was banned permanently. I appealed to get the answer as per why was I banned and no one ever gave me any explanation.
Don't waste your money and time on this scam app
a great place to find people who apparently like your match w them but not you
many fake accounts on here and my account was removed for no good reason, stay away from this app

Good on the surface but the pricing structure is insanely expensive. Just to send likes for £35 a month. Absolute rip off! And little other advantage for paying. Saying that, the app isn't shy about trying to match people when you can.
Some of the men are less repulsive than the usual dating app pool. Still not great though.
I got banned for no reason. I can't login anymore. I can't get any help from customer service, it's non-existent. Truly disappointing with this app.

It's a sham. They arbitrarily banned my account only claiming I violated the Terms and Conditions (but wouldn't say specifically what) even though I had only uploaded a single selfie and hadn't matched or talked with anyone. All these dating apps are scams.
not easy to ise and expensive AF
The account is banned shortly for no specific reasons
got a match and when we started to connect they blocked us to upgrade and thats something bad and very frustrating
The "we think you should meet" recommendations are always for people my basic settings say are incompatible.

Extremely disappointing experience. I created my account and within 6 hours, while I was actively chatting with someone, my account suddenly got banned for “violation of terms and conditions.” I did nothing wrong and received no explanation, no warning, and no chance to appeal. This kind of arbitrary banning is unacceptable. Poor moderation system and terrible user support. Feels unreliable and unsafe to use.

i just want to properly portray statistics and give ypu the real probabilities of it actually working. i have had friends help me built my profile i just don't thi k it works for me. it is worth the try and if it works for you it will keep working. i had it for 6 months and not a single like. at the same time it has worked really well for friends. the friends that had a like had it in the first 2 months. if you have bot had anything beyond that, do ypurself a favor and stop
I was logged in and got likes and conversation going. later I see I was not just logged out but practically my account was deleted.

the tagline says this is designed to be deleted, but out of all the dating app, this one is the most confusing and has worst ways to interact than other apps. so IMO, if you want a dating app that will actually get you dates, I don't think it's this one to be honest.

still the biggest scam of the dating apps, you get like 5 swipes a day and then the minimum membership is €18 year a week or €90 for 6 months. More expensive than any other dating app and even more expensive than an actual services like Netflix and Amazon, like they don't offer half of what they offer and expect more money?? biggest scam possible (and they way they flood YouTube ads is insufferable)
if the app was "made to be deleted" then why is it impossible to do anything without paying THIRTY DOLLARS?
scammers, they blocked my account for no reason at all even though I had an ongoing subscription

The app is glitchy. Paragraphs in a conversation randomly show up. Throwing the whole conversation off. I respond to conversation then a paragraph previously sent will show up. Ive tried Uninstalling and reinstalling many times.
horrible, I'm an adult and I ask for adult matches and it would give me people under my age all over . honestly disgusting. the filter is a joke
Obtuse GUI is uglier when sponsored by a generic AI algorithm demanding dishonest answers to fit the mold. worthless.

I got revenge banned after a pretty bad date. Tried to appeal but got a generic "violated terms of service" message and no specifics about what I did wrong. I found my fiancee on a different dating app one year later. 10/10 Would get banned again.
Used to love this app on Android. but the messaging is now broken. Always hiding the "your turn" messages. I have to restart the app to display them.
loggedout and told my email isnt linked
Useless humiliation ritual
Like all dating apps, if you're a man you had better be Chad or else good luck. You're better off meeting people in real life.
200 dollars for a year lmao an it says you'll get 3x more dates 3x0 is still 0, straight up does no one even use this app

Very disappointing experience. My account was permanently banned even though this was my first and only Hinge account. I did not create multiple accounts or violate any community guidelines.
